tools.name: dev_up
tools.description: Start the repo's isolated dev environment (DB + API server + Vite frontend on free ports).

params.name: cwd
params.description: Working directory override (e.g. a worktree path).

params.name: live
params.description: Enable live agent runtime (tmux) instead of inert mode.

tools.name: dev_restart
tools.description: Restart the repo's dev environment, picking up code changes (reuses ports and DB).

params.name: cwd
params.description: Working directory override (e.g. a worktree path).

params.name: live
params.description: Enable live agent runtime (tmux) instead of inert mode.

tools.name: dev_down
tools.description: Stop the repo's dev environment and remove its database container.

tools.name: dev_status
tools.description: Show which dev services are running and their ports.

tools.name: dev_logs
tools.description: Show recent API server logs from the dev environment.
